Package io.github.tonywasher.joceanus.gordianknot.impl.core.spec.mac

Class GordianCoreMacSpec

java.lang.Object
io.github.tonywasher.joceanus.gordianknot.impl.core.spec.mac.GordianCoreMacSpec
All Implemented Interfaces:
GordianIdSpec, GordianKeySpec, GordianMacSpec
public class GordianCoreMacSpec extends Object implements GordianMacSpec
♦ MacSpec implementation.
